# Vatcharamai Rodring (Chaiyo)

> Vatcharamai Rodring — nicknamed Chaiyo (or Yo) — is a software developer based
> in Bangkok, Thailand. He builds fast, clean web and application experiences and
> has worked on large-scale production platforms in fintech, workforce, and media.

- Full name: Vatcharamai Rodring
- Also known as: Chaiyo, Yo, Chaiyo Vatcharamai, Yo Vatcharamai
- Role: Software Developer
- Current employer: ODT (since January 2025)
- Location: Bangkok, Thailand
- Born: 21 September 2002
- Website: https://chaiyoyo.com/
- Email: yoyo.rodring@gmail.com

## Core technologies

React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Three.js, Go, Python, FastAPI,
PostgreSQL, Prisma, Flutter, Docker, Tailwind CSS, Figma, Agile/Scrum.

## Projects

- [Gig&Co](https://gigandco.work/): A workforce marketplace platform connecting
  businesses with gig workers — recruit, manage, and pay temporary staff through
  one digital platform. Built with Vite/TypeScript, Node.js, and Flutter.
- [Thailand Election 2569](https://election69.dailynews.co.th/): A real-time
  election-results platform built for Daily News (เดลินิวส์) covering Thailand's
  2026 general election and national referendum, streaming live vote counts on an
  interactive WebGL map. React front end, Scala backend, sub-second updates under
  a nationwide traffic spike.
- [Blocktrade](https://www.cgsi.co.th/our-offerings/platform/bets?lang=TH): A
  production block-trading platform for the Thai capital markets, handling large
  SET equity and TFEX derivative trades from order entry to exchange settlement.
  Event-driven microservices — React consoles, Node.js services, a Go FIX adapter,
  and a Python connector to the Stock Exchange of Thailand, tied together over
  RabbitMQ.
- KKP Tax Planner: A production product delivered with the ODT Scrum team.
- LostNFound: A university campus lost-and-found platform (undergraduate thesis)
  that matches reports using an NLP algorithm. Built with Next.js, FastAPI, and
  PostgreSQL.

## Experience

- Software Developer, ODT — January 2025 to present. Scrum team shipping and
  maintaining large-scale production products (Gig&Co, Blocktrade, KKP Tax Planner).
- Full-stack Developer (Internship), DevForward.tech — June to August 2024.
  Built a client web product end-to-end with Next.js and PHP.

## Education

- B.Sc. Computer Science, King Mongkut's University of Technology Thonburi
  (KMUTT), 2021–2024.
- Senior High School (Computer Major), Satit Prasarnmit Demonstration School,
  2018–2020.
